title: Nils Holgerssons underbara resa
writer: Kathrine Aurell, Tage Aurell, Per Gunvall
actors: Sven Lundberg, Max von Sydow, Annika Tretow
plot: Nils lives with his parents in the south of Sweden. He is a naughty boy and teases like the animals on the farm. They should not have him and be happy if he is bewitched one day with his hamster Crumb for punishment by a gnome.
